scripts.transpile: rimraf "dist" && tsc && xcopy "src\dll" "dist\src\dll" /Y /i && xcopy "src\assets" "dist\assets" /Y /i && xcopy "src\package" "dist\package" /Y /i && xcopy "src\overlay\*.html" "dist\src\overlay" /Y /i && xcopy "src\overlay\*.css" "dist\src\overlay" /Y /i
scripts.build:dev: set BUILD_TYPE=dev&& node scripts/set-env.js && yarn transpile && rimraf "FAI VCO OKPOS Agent Dev" && electron-builder && echo 1234 > "FAI VCO OKPOS Agent Dev/config.txt"
scripts.build:qa: set BUILD_TYPE=qa&& node scripts/set-env.js && yarn transpile && rimraf "FAI VCO OKPOS Agent QA" && electron-builder && echo 1234 > "FAI VCO OKPOS Agent QA/config.txt"
scripts.build:prd: set BUILD_TYPE=prd&& node scripts/set-env.js && yarn transpile && rimraf "FAI VCO OKPOS Agent" && electron-builder && echo 1234 > "FAI VCO OKPOS Agent/config.txt"
